name: bd-smart-pos
description: BD Smart POS — runs the backend API and frontend dev server together.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --kill-others-on-fail "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run preview"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
